home.title: Acuity — the insurer forms, drafted from your notes
home.description: Acuity drafts your Bupa, AIA and other HK insurer claim forms from the record you already have. You review the source, correct anything, and sign. Built for Hong Kong private clinics.

how-it-works.title: How it works — Acuity
how-it-works.description: Bring a record, Acuity drafts the insurer form, you review with the source in view, sign, and get the insurer's own PDF. Assistive, never autonomous — the doctor stays in command.

insurers.title: Insurers — does Acuity draft your forms?
insurers.description: See which HK insurers Acuity drafts at launch versus on the roadmap — Bupa, AIA, Cigna, Prudential, AXA and more. Coverage is read from the canonical registry and never overstated.

bupa.title: Acuity drafts your Bupa forms — Acuity
bupa.description: Acuity drafts your Bupa claim forms from your notes — you review the source and sign. See the supported Bupa forms and a realistic synthetic example.

customers.title: Customers — peers using Acuity
customers.description: Consented, legally-reviewed peer proof from HK private clinics, plus the founder's credentials and named institutional engagements. No patient testimonials.

about.title: About — Acuity
about.description: Acuity is a Hong Kong company building claim-form tooling for HK private clinics — founded by a registered family physician, with real local engagement at HKMA and HKCFP venues.

contact.title: Talk to us — Acuity
contact.description: Three ways to reach the Acuity team: WhatsApp, a booked 20-minute demo, or email. No obligation, no card — we'll show Acuity on your own insurer forms.

security.title: Security & Trust Centre — Acuity
security.description: How Acuity handles patient data: UK residency, access model, PDPO + UK GDPR alignment, the subprocessor list, and certification status — stated plainly, cookie-less.

footer.tagline: Insurer claim-form tooling, built for Hong Kong private clinics. You review and sign — Acuity drafts.
footer.presence: Hong Kong · HKD · English / 繁體中文

locale-suggest.body: 繁體中文版本可供選擇。

consent.body: We use minimal analytics on marketing pages to count page views, button clicks, and where visitors arrive from — nothing else. No session recording, no heatmaps, no cross-site profiling. The Security and Contact pages are cookie-less.

handoff.whatsapp: Opening WhatsApp — we usually reply within a few hours, in English or 繁中.
handoff.demo: Opening the demo calendar — pick any 20-minute slot that suits you.
handoff.email: Opening your email — we reply the same day.

cta.call-title: A 20-minute call, no obligation, no card.
cta.call-title-insurer: A 20-minute call, no obligation — we'll show Acuity on your own insurer forms.
cta.call-title-bupa: A 20-minute call, no obligation — we'll show Acuity on your own Bupa forms.
cta.call-title-customers: A 20-minute call — and we'll share case studies relevant to your specialty.
cta.call-lede: We'll show Acuity on your own insurer forms.

home.hero-title-lead: The Bupa and AIA forms, drafted from your notes —
home.hero-lede: Acuity drafts your insurer claim forms from the record you already have. You check the source, correct anything, and sign.
home.hero-cred: Built for HK private clinics — covering Bupa, AIA, and more at launch.
home.mock-source1: Pt presents with 18h of RLQ pain, anorexia, low-grade fever.
home.mock-source2-pre: O/E rebound tenderness at McBurney's point.
home.steps-title: Three steps. The doctor stays in command.
home.step1-body: Paste or attach the consultation note you already wrote — no re-keying.
home.step2-body: Every field is filled from your note, and every field shows where it came from.
home.step3-body: Check the source, correct anything, and sign — then get the insurer's own PDF.
home.coverage-title: Acuity drafts these insurers' forms at launch.
home.coverage-note: Coverage is read from the canonical registry shared with the doctor app — we never advertise coverage the product doesn't support.
home.proof-title: Built by a practising HK doctor, grounded locally.
home.proof1-body: Founded by a Hong Kong-registered family physician who knows the claim-form burden first-hand.
home.proof2-body: Presented at HKMA and HKCFP venues and local clinical events.
home.proof3-body: Six HK private clinics are in the launch pilot. We only state real numbers.
home.trust-line: Your patients' data stays in the UK, encrypted and access-controlled — read exactly how.
home.figure-label: Synthetic example of the Acuity review surface

how-it-works.hero-title: Does it actually do the thing? Yes — and you stay in command.
how-it-works.hero-lede: Acuity drafts your insurer forms from the record you already wrote. Every field shows its source, everything is editable, and you sign.
how-it-works.workflow-title: Five steps, from your note to the insurer's own PDF.
how-it-works.wf1-body: Paste or attach your consultation note.
how-it-works.wf2-body: The form is filled from your note.
how-it-works.wf3-body: See the source passage beside each field.
how-it-works.wf4-body: Correct anything, then sign it off.
how-it-works.wf5-body: Get the insurer's own form as a PDF.
how-it-works.figure-title: Every drafted value traces back to a source in your record.
how-it-works.mock-source1: 22/05 — Admitted via A&E. 18h RLQ pain, anorexia, low-grade fever.
how-it-works.mock-source2-pre: O/E rebound tenderness at McBurney's point, guarding.
how-it-works.mock-source3: Plan: laparoscopic appendicectomy, consent taken. Surgical team informed.
how-it-works.figure-caption: This example uses synthetic data — never a real patient. No patient data ever appears on a public page.
how-it-works.command-title: Acuity drafts. You decide. The product never acts on its own.
how-it-works.command-lede: Every value is editable, shows its source, and is signed by you. Acuity does not diagnose, does not approve, and never stands in for you.
how-it-works.cmd1-body: Every field is already in edit mode — no lock to unlock.
how-it-works.cmd2-body: Each drafted value shows where it came from in your record.
how-it-works.cmd3-body: Only you sign. Nothing leaves until you approve it.
how-it-works.roi-title: Fewer rejected claims and far less form-filling — you review instead of author.
how-it-works.roi-body: We don't promise a headline "hours saved" number. The return is burden lifted and cleaner claims.
how-it-works.work-title: No self-serve signup. One short call, and a straight answer on price.
how-it-works.work1-body: WhatsApp, email, or book a slot.
how-it-works.work3-body: We show Acuity on the forms you actually use.
how-it-works.work4-body: Try it at your own pace.
how-it-works.work5-body: Given on the call, per doctor.
how-it-works.cost-body: We'll quote you on the call — pricing is per doctor.
how-it-works.obligation-body: No obligation, no card. Stated, and literally true.
how-it-works.data-body-pre: Data stays in the UK, encrypted and access-controlled.
how-it-works.forms-eyebrow: Will it work on my forms?
how-it-works.forms-body-pre: Check the insurers covered at launch.
how-it-works.no-price-body: Clinic size and configuration affect the quote, so we give you one number on a short call — not a pricing maze.
how-it-works.figure-label: Synthetic example of the Acuity review surface showing a field beside its source passage

insurers.hero-title: Does it work on my forms?
insurers.hero-lede: See which insurers' forms Acuity drafts at launch, and which are on the roadmap. Coverage is read from the canonical registry and never overstated.
insurers.grid-note: Only licensed insurer marks are used. Coverage shares one registry with the doctor app's form-selection screen — so the site can never advertise coverage the product doesn't support.
insurers.not-listed-title: Tell us which forms you use — we'll let you know when they're covered.
insurers.not-listed-lede: Never a dead end. A roadmap insurer is an honest "on the roadmap", not an overclaim.
insurers.how-title: See how Acuity drafts on the insurer's own form, with the source linked.

bupa.hero-lede: Every field shows its source in your record. You check it, correct it, and sign.
bupa.hero-cta: See Acuity on your Bupa forms
bupa.trademark: "Bupa" is a trademark of its respective owner, named here only to identify coverage.

bupa.roadmap-eyebrow: Some Bupa forms are on the roadmap
bupa.roadmap-title: Tell us which Bupa forms you use.
bupa.closing-title: A 20-minute call, no obligation — we'll show Acuity on your own Bupa forms.

customers.hero-title: Doctors in HK private practice use Acuity on their own insurer forms.
customers.hero-lede: Only consented, legally-reviewed, attributable proof. No patient testimonials — excluded by construction, in line with the MCHK Code.
customers.proof-title: Peer proof, matched by specialty and locality.
customers.quote1: "I review a draft instead of authoring from scratch. Rejected claims are down."
customers.quote2: "Every field shows its source, so I can trust it before I sign."
customers.quote3: "Pre-auth forms used to be the worst part of my day."
customers.floor1-body: Founded by a Hong Kong-registered family physician.
customers.floor2-body: Presented at HKMA and HKCFP venues.
customers.floor3-body: Six HK private clinics in the launch pilot. Real numbers only.
customers.closing-title: A 20-minute call — and we'll share case studies relevant to your specialty.

about.hero-title: Acuity is a Hong Kong company building claim-form tooling for HK private clinics.
about.hero-lede: Specific, evidence-backed claims — no superlatives without proof.
about.presence-title: Grounded in Hong Kong, built by a practising doctor.
about.presence1-body: Acuity is founded by a Hong Kong-registered family physician who knows the claim-form burden first-hand.
about.presence2-body: Presented at HKMA and HKCFP venues and at local clinical events.
about.presence3-body: A local team, local contact, and quotes in HKD — not an offshore vendor.
about.mission-title: We exist to take insurer paperwork off doctors so they can spend the time on patients.
about.closing-title: A 20-minute call, no obligation — we'll show Acuity on your own insurer forms.

contact.hero-title: Talk to us — no obligation, no card.
contact.hero-lede: We'll show Acuity on your own insurer forms. Choose whichever channel suits you.
contact.whatsapp-body: Text us on WhatsApp — we usually reply within a few hours, in English or 繁中.
contact.demo-body: Book a 20-minute demo at a time that suits you.
contact.email-body: Prefer email? Write to us and we'll reply the same day.
contact.channel-note: If one channel is down, the other two still work — never a single point of failure. All service marks are single-tone.
contact.obj-cost-body: We quote you on the call — per doctor.
contact.obj-obligation-body: No obligation, no card. Literally true.

security.hero-title: Your patients' data stays in the UK, encrypted, access-controlled, and handled under PDPO and UK GDPR — here's exactly how.
security.hero-lede: This page sets no cookies, loads no third-party analytics, and is self-sufficient for a diligence-minded reader — no sales call needed.
security.residency-body: Records are stored and processed in the UK, encrypted at rest and in transit. No data is held outside the UK jurisdiction.
security.access-body: Access is least-privilege, role-bound, and logged. Clinic data is never used to train shared models.
security.reg-title: PDPO plus UK GDPR, with cross-border safeguards.
security.dpp1: Data collected only for a clear, lawful purpose.
security.dpp3: Used only for the purpose it was collected for.
security.dpp4: Protected with encryption and access control.
security.dpp6: Clinics can access and correct their data.
security.sub-title: Who touches data, and where certification stands.
security.sub-note: Certifications still in progress are labelled in-progress, never implied complete. Privacy text is authored by Acuity compliance/legal, not engineering.

legal.privacy-note: This text is authored by Acuity compliance/legal, not engineering. The structure below is a placeholder.
legal.privacy1-body: Marketing pages use limited, consented analytics only (page views, button clicks, referral source). The Security and Contact pages are cookie-less.
legal.privacy2-body: No patient data ever appears on this public website. The product's data handling is set out in the Trust Centre.
legal.privacy3-body: Under PDPO and UK GDPR — rights of access, correction, and enquiry. Contact compliance@acuity.hk.
legal.terms-note: This text is authored by Acuity compliance/legal. The structure below is a placeholder.
legal.terms1-body: This public website provides information and hands enquiries to the Acuity team. There is no account and no self-serve signup.
legal.terms2-body: Coverage is marked launch vs roadmap and read from the canonical registry. Insurer names are used for identification only.

not-found.title: That page isn't here — but we can get you back.
not-found.lede: The link you followed may have moved or expired. Let's get you back on track.
not-found.root-lede: The link you followed may have moved or expired.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.lede: The page hit an unexpected error. Try again in a moment.
